name: tavern-owner-visitor-view-separation
title: Tavern owner and visitor view separation
description: Separate /tavern/:id visitor chat from /tavern/:id/manage owner management so management no longer lives inside the chat workbench.
scope: frontend route/view split for tavern visitor vs owner management; no backend/schema changes
creator: lijin
notes:
User confirmed the root issue is mixed owner/visitor product views, not only right-rail CSS. Owner management must become a separate management-only route.
Implemented and verified dedicated owner/visitor route split. See completion.md and artifacts/playwright/report.md.
Deferred/not done items were explicitly recorded in meta.deferred_not_done on 2026-05-06.

deferred_not_done.item: 店主管理页内各管理面板的二次 UX 重设计
deferred_not_done.reason: 本任务目标是先完成访客/店主视角与路由分离；Roleplay/Home/Visitor Notes 面板只迁移复用，未重新设计交互密度、分区和表单体验。
deferred_not_done.suggested_followup: 单独创建 owner management UX polish 任务，按模块重排店主控制台。

deferred_not_done.item: 完整角色编辑器、SillyTavern 导入、LLM Key/模型配置、访问规则编辑整合到新管理页
deferred_not_done.reason: 这些属于更大的 owner console 功能整合，会触及更多服务/API/UI 合约；本任务未扩展后端或 Schema。
deferred_not_done.suggested_followup: 按“角色管理 / LLM 配置 / 访问规则”拆分 Trellis 子任务。

deferred_not_done.item: 后端 owner-only 权限模型调整
deferred_not_done.reason: 当前仅调整前端路由与视图分离，仍沿用既有 user_id/owner_id 查询参数和后端校验；未新增认证机制。
deferred_not_done.suggested_followup: 如需正式权限体系，另开身份与权限边界任务。

deferred_not_done.item: 管理页经营信息可视化重排
deferred_not_done.reason: 本任务只保证管理页不再混在聊天页里；经营指标、访客反馈、NPC 审批等信息的优先级和布局仍可继续优化。
deferred_not_done.suggested_followup: 基于当前 dedicated manage route 做 dashboard 信息架构设计。
